column1: # /File Xtract — save a range to a new file.
# Flow: /FX descends into Formulas|Values submenu, picks one, prompts
# for a filename, then POINTs for the range to extract.  The resulting
# file can be retrieved and inspected.
# This transcript walks the UI for the Formulas branch.  Whether the
# saved file preserves formulas vs. replaces them with values is the
# subject of a separate unit test.
# POINT for the range.  POINT auto-anchors at the current pointer
# (A3 after the formula commit).  HOME slides the free corner up to
# A1, giving a full A1..A3 range.
# Commit → back to READY, data unchanged in memory.
